emails.subject: deal 637225
emails.body: deal 637225 This is the deal we made for El Paso last Friday to replace deal 235670, which had Teco. Julie Meyers needs a price to be added to the deal. Which price should I add?

emails.subject: Re: deal 637225
emails.body: Re: deal 637225 The new deal should have the same price as the deal that you copied. D Michael Olsen@ENRON 02/26/2001 02:54 PM

emails.body: Re: deal 637225 You need to delete the lines with dates prior to 1/1/01 on the new tickets. D Michael Olsen@ENRON 02/26/2001 02:54 PM
